positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with the session established
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI (e.g., header or profile section)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements render correctly, are interactive, and the password field masks input
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login' or 'Sign In')
Verify the email/username input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password field masks the entered characters
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is visible and clickable
Verify any branding elements (logo, application name) are displayed correctly
Verify optional elements such as 'Forgot Password' link or 'Sign Up' link are present if applicable
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements render correctly

positive_scenarios.expected_result: The password visibility toggle correctly shows and hides the password text on each click
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the password text is masked by default
Click the password visibility toggle icon (eye icon) if available
Verify the password text is now visible in plain text
Click the password visibility toggle icon again
Verify the password text is masked again
positive_scenarios.title: Password field toggle shows and hides password text

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after a page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Unauthenticated access to a protected route redirects to login, and after successful login, the user is redirected to the intended page
steps: Ensure no active user session exists (clear cookies/session storage if needed)
Navigate directly to a protected/internal application URL (e.g., the dashboard URL)
Verify the application redirects to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the originally requested protected page or the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Redirect to login page when accessing protected route while unauthenticated and login succeeds

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and protected routes are no longer accessible
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' option (e.g., from user profile menu)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that navigating to a protected route now redirects to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are displayed indicating that username and password fields are required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required', or 'Please fill in all fields')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter an incorrect password (e.g., 'WrongPassword123!') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect username or password')
Verify the password field is cleared or remains focused for re-entry
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error is shown indicating an invalid email format before or after form submission
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'invalidemail' or 'test@' or 'test.com') in the username/email field
Enter any value in the password field (e.g., 'AnyPassword1!')
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error indicating the username/email field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed on or near the username field (e.g., 'Email is required' or 'Please enter your email')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username field and valid password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed on or near the password field (e.g., 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and empty password field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected with a generic error message that does not confirm whether the email account exists
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email address (e.g., 'nonexistentuser99999@gmail.com') in the username/email field
Enter any password (e.g., 'SomePassword1!') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'No account found with this email')
Verify the error message does NOT reveal whether the email exists or not (security best practice)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent user email

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection attempt, rejects the login, and does not expose any sensitive system or database information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a SQL injection string in the username/email field (e.g., "' OR '1'='1'; --" or "admin'--")
Enter any value in the password field (e.g., 'password')
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed
Verify the application does not crash, expose database errors, or grant unauthorized access
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles extremely long inputs, rejects the login, displays an appropriate error, and does not crash or expose system errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a very long string in the username/email field (e.g., a 256-character email string such as 'aaaaaa...@test.com')
Enter a very long string in the password field (e.g., a 500-character random string)
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated
Verify the application handles the input gracefully without crashing
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or input length validation error)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long username and password (boundary value)
